Where I go deep

Three platforms, one connected marketing system

Unifying customer data, activating it across the lifecycle, and layering agentic AI on top to compound the results.

Engagement & Lifecycle

Agentforce Marketing

Marketing Cloud journeys, personalization, and Account Engagement (Pardot) — spanning B2C lifecycle and B2B/B2B2C account-based marketing. Multi-persona campaigns that move redemption, retention, and conversion.

Data & Identity

Data 360 (Data Cloud)

Customer Data Platform strategy, identity resolution, and clean, governed data foundations — activation-ready across owned channels and paid media. Scaled to 20+ business units in regulated environments.

Applied Intelligence

Agentforce AI

Agentic and generative AI mapped to high-value marketing use cases — content, propensity, audience modeling, and campaign optimization — designed for production with clear data flows, governance, and KPIs.

Why me, for a Business Agency

The senior MarTech voice in every room

Boardroom to architecture table. I connect technology investment to measurable business outcomes for CEOs and CMOs, and hold my own on data, identity, and AI architecture with CTOs and CIOs.
I helped write the playbook. The sole sales contributor on the team that built Salesforce's ABM for Healthcare go-to-market strategy — shaping how the field takes account-based marketing to the sector.
Every go-to-market model. B2B, B2C, B2B2C, and account-based marketing — from member and consumer lifecycles to enterprise demand and partner-channel motions.
AI applied, not sponsored. I frame the AI thesis, prioritize high-value use cases, and design for production with governance and clear KPIs.
MarTech meets media. I design the data, identity, and activation patterns that link CDP/CRM to paid media — and bring performance signal back to power personalization.
Practice builder. Deep Salesforce relationships across Marketing Cloud, Data Cloud, and Agentforce; I grow high-performing teams and reusable IP that scales across clients.
